---
title: "Joe's Website"
---

$$m\alpha t\pi \space 7\epsilon S \tau$$

<!---
entries will follow this format:
<article>
<h3><a href=""> </a></h3>
<div class="summary">
<span><i class="fa fa-calendar"></i> _date_</span>
<p> ...</p>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" href="">Full Post</a>
</div>
</article>
--->

<article>
<h3><a href="constrOptim.html">Constrained Linear Optimisation in R</a></h3>
<div class="summary">
<span><i class="fa fa-calendar"></i> _2019-02-08_</span>
<p>manual text here</p>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" href="constrOptim.html" role="button">Full Post</a>
</div>
</article>
